summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of LCE-WAI training platform. Backend: 34/34 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified — landing/auth, student dashboard, modules+quiz, certificates+PDF, 9 online + 12 in-person labs (21 total), basic-circuit-sim auto-grading, LOTO sequence, in-person photo submission, competency matrix (8 areas), AI tutor (Claude Sonnet 4.5 — all 3 modes), instructor lab approvals, role-based routing. 'Cohort' → 'Associate' rename verified across backend and frontend code (only stale string left is /app/memory/test_credentials.md).

minor.issue: LabSubmitReq pydantic model requires `lab_slug` in JSON body even though slug is already in the URL path — duplicate/redundant. Returns 422 if body omits it. Should be made optional or derived from path.

issues: Certificate card preview image shows garbled placeholder text ('IRECIPRATE COURD NAME' / 'Name Suruurane' / 'ELECTRICAL TRADE SCHOOL PROGRAM') — looks like an AI-generated stock image with mangled letters. PDF download itself works fine. Replace preview image with a clean SVG/static asset.

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md — replace 'Cohort' / 'Cohort-Alpha' with 'Associate' / 'Associate-Alpha' for consistency with the rename.
Replace garbled certificate preview image on /certificates with a clean asset (current image has nonsense text).
Optional: make LabSubmitReq.lab_slug optional or auto-fill from path slug in POST /api/labs/{slug}/submit so clients aren't required to send it twice.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 805 lines — getting close to the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers (auth, modules, labs, certs, ai, admin).
LabSubmitReq.lab_slug duplicates the URL path param.
JWT secret has dev fallback hint in /app/backend/.env (intentional for now). Ensure JWT_SECRET is rotated for production.
seed_data_creation: Tests register new students with TEST_<uuid>@example.com prefix. Quiz completion + lab submissions are persisted on the seeded student account. No cleanup performed (acceptable for non-destructive tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All seeded creds work. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_lcewai.py covers 34 tests across auth/modules/quiz/certs/AI/labs/instructor/competencies/admin. The 'Cohort'→'Associate' rename is fully done in code; only leftover is the docs file /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Lab submit endpoint quirk: must include lab_slug in body.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Documentation lag (test_credentials.md) and a placeholder certificate image are the only loose ends.
